title: Cinematic Character Design Board
sourceTitle: Create Cinematic Realistic Character Design Board High

imagePrompts.prompt:
Create a cinematic, realistic character design board for a high-budget film production.

Please steer clear of generic grids, perfect symmetry, or template-style layouts. The composition should feel art-directed, slightly asymmetrical, and visually intentional—just like a premium movie pitch presentation.

Design a realistic human character with grounded proportions, believable anatomy, natural imperfections, and expressive acting energy.

Include:
* Full-body turnaround (front, 3/4, side, back, 3/4 back)
* Expressive head studies from multiple angles
* Cinematic portrait shot
* Wardrobe and prop breakdown
* Realistic fabric, skin, and material textures
* Annotation callouts and production notes
* Height reference scale

The character should feel like a real actor captured in the moment, not just a posed model sheet.

Style:
Semi-realistic cinematic character design with film-production quality, soft natural lighting, emotional readability, subtle exaggeration, realistic materials, shallow depth of field, and a premium studio presentation aesthetic.

Important:
Keep strict consistency in facial features, proportions, hairstyle, outfit, and details across every angle and section.
